# Luminary Premium Hardware

Luminary creates premium hardware for modern workflows, featuring Grade-5 titanium construction and precision digital controls.

## Main Navigation
- [Home Page](index.html)
- [Products](#products)
- [Innovation](#features)
- [About](#about)
- [Connect](#connect)

## Key Products
- [Horizon Display](index.html#products): 32-inch 6K retina canvas.
- [Keyframe Core](index.html#products): Low-profile mechanical keyboard.
- [Acoustic Bar](index.html#products): Cylindrical space-filling soundbar.

## Documentation
- [Innovation Features](index.html#features): Technical details on titanium alloy, acoustic design, and active haptics.
- [Contact/Allocation](index.html#connect): Request access to premium customized configurations.
